Capture network traffic in a controlled environment using Wireshark. ● Security Analysis & Fixing
Analyze captured traffic to identify potential vulnerabilities and recommend security enhancements. OWASP ZAP (Zed Attack Proxy) Security Testing Framework
Create a web application with some common vulnerabilities. ● Security Analysis & Fixing
Use OWASP ZAP to perform security testing on the application
and then fix these issues by implementing secure coding practices. Web Application Vulnerability Identification Using Burp Suite
Develop a simple web application with common security flaws
and broken authentication mechanisms. ● Security Analysis & Fixing
Use Burp Suite to scan the application
and analyze the attack surface. Afterward
secure the application by fixing these vulnerabilities and re-running the scan to verify the fixes. Penetration Testing Framework Using Metasploit
Set up a vulnerable virtual environment using tools like Metasploitable or create your own vulnerable system or network services. ● Security Analysis & Fixing
Use Metasploit to exploit the system
demonstrate various attacks like privilege escalation
and security best practices to mitigate the discovered vulnerabilities
